channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CBS News terminates veteran 60 Minutes correspondent Scott Pelley
item.description: CBS News has dismissed longtime 60 Minutes correspondent and former 'CBS Evening News' anchor Scott Pelley a day after a tense and confrontational meeting.

item.title: Primary elections underway in six states including California and Iowa
item.description: Voters in California will choose a successor to Governor Gavin Newsom, while Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass faces multiple challengers.

item.title: Honduras gang leader 'Black Cat' arrested for 19 murders
item.description: The killings occurred in the volatile Bajo Aguan region, where rival gangs compete for control of palm farms and drug trafficking routes.

item.title: Iran says deadly attack on Kuwait is retaliation for US strikes
item.description: Despite Trump's claim of ongoing talks, Iran launched a missile and drone attack on Kuwait, citing retaliation for recent US strikes.
